title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
abstract: Multi-platform social media crawler supporting Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Weibo, Baidu Tieba, Zhihu. AI-powered content collection and data mining from China's major social platforms.
abstract_zh: 全网社交媒体爬虫！支持小红书、抖音、快手、B站、微博、百度贴吧、知乎等全平台内容采集。AI驱动的社交媒体数据挖掘工具，为AI训练和内容分析提供数据源。国产项目。
